tasks.subject: Task 0: ocr-service 스캐폴드 + /ocr + /healthz
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Python FastAPI 서비스를 만들고 GOT-OCR2 로 단일 이미지를 처리하는 최소 동작 흐름을 검증.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ocr-service/pyproject.toml", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/app.py", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/model.py", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/config.py", "ocr-service/tests/conftest.py", "ocr-service/tests/test_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd ocr-service && pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pip install passes", "6 pytest tests pass", "GET /healthz returns 200", "POST /ocr enforces Bearer + image_b64"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: GOT-OCR2 실제 로딩 + idle 자동 언로드 + /status + /unload
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GOT-OCR2 real loading + idle timer + status/unload endpoints.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ocr-service/src/ocr_service/model_real.py", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/idle.py", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/app.py", "ocr-service/tests/test_model.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd ocr-service && pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/status returns loaded state", "/unload returns 423 if in-flight", "idle watcher unloads via fake clock", "startup wires GotOcr2Runner"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ocr-service /gpu/raw (nvidia-smi)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose nvidia-smi totals + per-process VRAM via /gpu/raw.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ocr-service/src/ocr_service/gpu.py", "ocr-service/src/ocr_service/app.py", "ocr-service/tests/test_gpu.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd ocr-service && pytest tests/test_gpu.py tests/test_app.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses totals + processes", "missing nvidia-smi returns 200 + available:false", "Bearer auth required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ocr-service 컨테이너화 (Containerfile + Quadlet)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Containerfile + Quadlet unit for desktop deploy.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ocr-service/Containerfile", "ocr-service/deploy/ocr-service.container", "ocr-service/deploy/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "podman build -t ocr-service:dev ocr-service/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["podman build succeeds", "container refuses no-token start", "/healthz smoke passes", "README desktop-only emphasized"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: bridge /ocr 프록시 추가
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bridge proxies /ocr POSTs to desktop ocr-service. OCR_SERVICE_URL required env.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/ocr.ts", "bridge/src/ocr.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test -- --run ocr", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 vitest tests pass", "Bearer + image_b64 validation", "503 on upstream error", "OCR_SERVICE_URL required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: bridge /gpu/status fan-out 합본
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge ocr-service /gpu/raw + /status + Ollama /api/ps into single JSON.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/gpu.ts", "bridge/src/gpu.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test -- --run gpu", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 vitest tests pass", "merges all three upstreams", "graceful partial failure", "spec §4.4 shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: bridge /gpu/unload 백엔드 라우팅
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Backend-routed unload. ollama → /api/generate keep_alive:0. ocr → ocr-service /unload.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/gpu.ts", "bridge/src/gpu.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test -- --run gpu", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ollama backend → /api/generate keep_alive:0", "ocr backend → /unload", "423 passthrough", "unknown backend → 400", "missing name on ollama → 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 노트 시그니처 translate: 헤더 + defaults 단순화
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OCR note schema extension with translate: header + legacy flag. Remove target_lang.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/ocrNote/defaults.ts", "app/src/lib/ocrNote/parseOcrNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/ocrNote/parseOcrNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm test -- --run parseOcrNote", "acceptanceCriteria": ["translateModel field added", "legacy flag true when no translate: header", "target_lang silently ignored", "7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: runOcrInEditor 두 단계 분리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OCR → translate sequential calls. [원문]/[번역] blocks streamed. Legacy notes fall back to single-call.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/ocrNote/sendOcr.ts", "app/src/lib/ocrNote/runOcrInEditor.ts", "app/tests/unit/ocrNote/sendOcr.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm test -- --run ocrNote && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sendOcr happy path + 401/503/400/network", "two-stage flow streams [원문] then [번역]", "legacy fallback retains old single-call", "svelte-check 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: /admin/gpu 페이지
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GPU monitor page in admin with VRAM bar, model list, manual unload buttons. 5s polling while visible.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/gpuMonitor/types.ts", "app/src/lib/gpuMonitor/client.ts", "app/src/routes/admin/gpu/+page.svelte", "app/src/routes/admin/+layout.svelte", "app/tests/unit/gpuMonitor/client.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm test -- --run gpuMonitor && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 client tests pass", "polling 5s + visibility-gated", "unload buttons + toast feedback", "empty/error states", "subtab in admin nav"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: invariant 문서화 (머신 분리)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record "Pi bridge has no GPU; all models on desktop" invariant in two places to prevent regression.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/skills/tomboy-terminal/SKILL.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -l 'Bridge.*no GPU\\|Bridge ≠ model host' CLAUDE.md .claude/skills/tomboy-terminal/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tomboy-terminal SKILL has invariant", "CLAUDE.md has invariant bullet", "env vars OLLAMA_BASE_URL/OCR_SERVICE_URL/RAG_SEARCH_URL mentioned"]}
```
